experience.description: Presented various projects including VPN, RDMS, and IT Proposals to several classes and instructors. Worked independently and as part of a team to achieve most equitable outcome.

Diligently reviewed the specialty loan portfolio for compliance with all reporting requirements. Communicated regularly with management regarding portfolio performance and new loan transaction quality.

Developed interesting course plans to meet academic, intellectual and social needs of students. Developed and implemented interesting and interactive learning mediums to increase student understanding of course materials.
